titleStmt.title: SII 23.579: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 579. (A.R. No. 579 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 2nd and 3rd tiers of the north base and on the three tiers of the west base of the same maṇḍapa Vikrama-Chōḷa. year 8, Śaka 1047 Viśvāvasu: A.D. 1125-26

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Pūmādu puṇara etc. This registers the gift of the village Maṇṇūr alias Vikramaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēṟpākkai-nāḍu, a division of Adhirājēndramaṇḍalam, as an agrahāra of 70 shares to several learned Brāhmaṇas, for securing success to the king's arms, by the chief Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vimalādityadēva who is stated to have been ruling Pottappi-nāḍu. He was the son of Siddharasa and was called Madhurāntaka Pottappichchōḻa. A list of all the donees is given with the number of shares each got, being specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat tantiruppatu malar maṉnavarcūṭa maṉniya vurimaiyil maṇi muṭi cūṭic ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṅkali kaṭin=tu mey yaṟan=taḻaippak kaliṅka miriyakkaṭarmalai naṭātti valaṅkolāḻi varai Ūḻi naṭātti Iricuṭaraḷavu morukuṭainiḻaṟṟac cempoṉvira siṅ hāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopara kesaripanmarāṉa tribhuvanac cakravattikaḷ śrīvikramacoḻa devaṟkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu Iperumāḷ śrībhujaṅkaḷ vardhikka Agrahāram paṇṇinen svatti caraṇa
saroruha vihitavilocana pramukhākhila prithiviśvarakārita kāverī tīra karikālakularatnapradīpāhita kumārāṅkuśa nayanasimhaḥ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍale śvaran vimalādityadevan pottappi nāṭāḷāniṟkka śakavarṣam Āyirattu nāṟpatteḻāṉa viśvāvasusamvatsaram Adhirājendramaṇṭalattu meṟ pākkai nāṭṭu maṇṇūrāṉa vikramacoḻaccaturvedimaṅkalam koḷḷi miṟuvuḷp paṭṭu vūr nālppālellaikkumuḷḷuḷḷa nañcaipuñcai nilamuḷḷutum kāṭummeṭum malaikaḷum kuḻikaḷum
Ellāmakappaṭṭa naṭuvuḷḷa nilamellām Eḻupatu bhāgamākki Ivāṇṭai dakṣaṇāyanattil Ācandratāram Akaramāka dharmadānam paṇṇi dhārāpūrva kamākak kuṭutten siddharasar makan madhurān=takap pottappic coḻaṉ vimalādityaneṉ Eṉ pakkal Ivvūr Akaramāka dharmadānam peṟṟuṭaiya bhaṭṭarkaḷ ..vatsagotrattu muṭumpai yajñanārāyaṇa daśapriya bhaṭṭa ssomayājiyār paṅku Iraṇṭu ..ikkuṭi śrībhādabhaṭṭa ssoma yājiyār paṅku Onṟarai ..[gauta]ma gotrattu dveda komapuṟattu vāmanaccaturvedibhaṭṭar paṅku Arai ..bhāradvajāgotrattu kārampic ceṭṭu kumārasvāmibhaṭṭar paṅku Arai ..ikkuṭi nnayabhaṭṭar paṅkarai . —bhāradvāji kurovi śrīkṛṣṇabhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..gautamagotrattu kurāvaciri dakṣiṇāmurtti bhayar paṅku Oṉṟu ..
bhāradvājagotrattup pāṭakattu Āṭkoṇṭānbhaṭṭar paṅku Iraṇṭu .. Ikkuṭi vāmanabhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟarai ..vādhūlagotrattuk kan=tāṭaic caṅkara nārāyaṇa bhayar paṅku Onṟu ..naṭeṟappaḷḷit tiruvicalū raṭikaḷ bhaṭṭar paṅku Arai ..bhāradvājagotrattu vaṟṟalūr bālendu mauli bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..bhāradvājagotrattuk kāñcikkuṟi ssarvadeva bhaṭṭa Upādhyāyar paṅku Arai ..pādhūlagotrattuk kan=tāṭai yādavabhaṭṭan paṅku Oṉṟu ..vatsagotrattu Uṟuppuṭṭūr patmanābhapaṇḍi tar paṅku Iraṇṭu ..vādhūlagotrattuk kan=tāṭai mādhavadaśapriya bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..vādhūlagotrattuk kan=tāṭait tiruveṅkaṭa bhaṭṭa ratirātrayājiyār makan śrīrāmabhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..ikkuṭi Āḷavantān bhaṭṭar paṅku Arai ..puḷiṅkaṟkuṟik kovāṇṭān bhaṭṭassomayājiyār paṅku Iraṇṭu ..bhāradvāji Īvuṇi śrīrāmabhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..
Ikkuṭi doṇayabhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu .. Ikkuṭic ciṟiya doṇaya bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..caṭamarṣaṇa gotrattu Irāyūr coṭṭai Īśvara bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu . haritan kirāñci śrīrāmabhaṭṭar paṅku mukkāl . kośika gotrattu prayāgai ssomanāthapaṇṭita ssomayājiyār paṅku Onṟu ..vādhūlagotrattuk kan=tāṭait tiruveṅkaṭa daśapriyabhaṭṭar paṅku Arai ..bhāratvāja gotrattu pattarai śrīrāmabhaṭṭan paṅku Onṟu ..vādhūla gotrattuk kan=tāṭai dāmodaraccaturvedibhaṭṭa ssoma yājiyār paṅku Oṉṟu ..vatsagotrattu muṭumpai śrīvatsāmkabhaṭṭa ssomayājiyār paṅku mukkāl ..kuṇḍinagotrattu komapuṟattu mādhava daśapriyabhaṭṭar paṅku Oṉṟu ..vatsagotrattu muṭumpait tiruveṅkaṭa bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..ikkuṭi śrīvatsāṅka (ṅ)bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu .. Ikkuṭi yajñanārāyaṇa bhaṭṭar paṅku mukkāl ..koṉarāñci yajña nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..
kuṇḍinagotrattu komapuṟattu dakṣiṇāmurtti caturvedibhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..vatsagotrattu Uṟuppuṭṭūr nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu .. Ikkuṭi Ulakamuṇṭān bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..ceṟuvanūr Īśvarabha
ṭṭasarvātithyan paṅku Onṟu ..
kuṇḍinagotrattu komapuṟattuc candrakumārabhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu .. kauśikagotrattu Iruṅkaṇṭi veṇṇaikkūtta bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..satsan Uṟuppuṭṭūr bhūti viṣṇubhaṭṭar paṅku Oṉṟu ..
nīddhṛva kāśyapagotrattu Aṭṭāmpuṟattu śrīrāmabhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu .. Ikkuṭi yajñamurtti bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..vatsagotrattu Uṟup puṭṭūr Aruḷāḷa bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu .vatsagotrattu naṭātūr nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..
haritan surasārampi nārāyaṇa phaṭṭar paṅku kāl ..ikkuṭi Āṭkoṇṭavilli daśapriyabhaṭṭar paṅku Arai ..ikkuṭi śrīrāma bhaṭṭar paṅku mukkāl ..vādhūlagotrattuk kan=tāṭai vināyaka bhaṭṭāḻvār paṅku Onṟu ..pāṭakattu somadevabhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..śaṭamarṣaṇa gotrattu Irāyūr coṭṭai rudraviṣṇubhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..vatsagotrattu Uṟuppuṭṭūr ṣaṣṭirudra bhaṭṭar paṅku Arai . bhāradvāja gotrattu mutu paṅku Arai ..āṭukkuṭi somā skanda kumāra paṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..ātreya kotrattuk kiṭampi Irāmapirān bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..kauśika gotrattu ceṭṭalūr ponnāḻik kayya bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..kāśyapa gotrattu vaṅkippuṟattu Aruḷāḷa daśapriya
haritagotrattuk kirāñci doṇayabhaṭṭar paṅku mukkāl ..vāṇan=ti śrīnilakaṇṭha bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..vādhūlagotrattuc caṅkara nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭa ssomayājiyār paṅku Arai ..haritagotrattu Ālikkonṟai nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭar paṅku Arai ..kauśika gotrattu ceṭṭa lūr Ayyapirānpaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..bhāradvājagotrattup poṟp puṟattu śrīkṛṣṇa bhaṭṭar paṅkarai ..peruṅkaṇṭūr kāśyapan periya rasarbhaṭṭan paṅku Onṟu ..vatsan jannayabhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..kauśi kan kecava bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..kuṇḍina gotrattu peddaṇadvivedi paṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..kauśikan Īśvarabhaṭṭan pagku Onṟu ..kāśyapan nāgebhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..ivvūr brāhmaṇaṟkku vaidya
(inaccessible for copyinṅ)
kippuṟattu Aruḷāḷa daśapriya bhaṭṭar paṅku Onṟu ..vatsagotrattu vaṅkip puṟattu yajñamurttic caturvedi bhaṭṭa somayājiyār paṅku Onṟu ..bhāradvājagotrattu kuṇṭūr cirāmabhaṭṭar paṅku Arai ..
Ivvūr brāhmaṇaṟkku vaidyam paṇṇukaikku kāśyapan colai Aracu bhaṭṭanukkup pagku Onṟu ..ākap paṅku Eḻupatu ..per 7 10 4 .. śrīmaa dvijapradhānānām sumṛtat grāmavāsinām ..
śāsanam liśvamurvagnibhīṣaṇam viduṣāmidam ..svastī śrī siddhibhūpasya sū nūnā sūrya tejasā pimalāditya devena śāsanam śāśvatīkṛtam .. jayan=ti vimalādityadevasya pṛthukīrttayaḥ dhava
bīkrata vistīrṇa viśvabrahmāṇamaṇḍalāḥ ..svadattām paradattām vā yo harata vasundharām ṣaṣṭim varṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyām jāyate kṛmiḥ .. bahūbhi rvasudhā dattā rājabhi ssagarādibhiḥ
yasya yasya yadā bhūmi stasya tasyatathā chalam ..

rājñā vikramacoḷa
sya caraṇāmbuja reṇavaḥ .
jayan=ti praṇatāśeṣanṛ
pakoṭīśa cumbinaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 23.579 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
